name: relatex
description: Safari Web Extension that renders raw LaTeX on ChatGPT pages.

scripts.build:safari: xcrun safari-web-extension-converter extension --project-location . --app-name ReLaTeX --bundle-identifier com.aurxs.ReLaTeX --macos-only --swift --copy-resources --no-open --no-prompt --force && bash scripts/patch-host-app.sh
